visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a ruffled lavender top and a black vest, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is holding a Donald Duck plush toy that has a grumpy facial expression. In the background, shelves are stacked with pink plush bears and other merchandise. (2) She demonstrates the functionality of the plushie by pulling out a blue plastic hot water bottle from its back. Her hands are seen clearly as she unscrews the blue cap and puts the bottle back inside the plushie's clothing. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a retail warehouse. (3) The camera pans upward to reveal a price tag hanging from the ceiling, showing the brand 'DISNEY' and the price '$ 549'. The woman continues to handle the plushie in the foreground, showing its soft texture and the character's angry eyes and yellow beak. (4) The woman holds the plushie to her chest and faces the camera, smiling and speaking animatedly. She uses her hands to point at the plushie's features while maintaining eye contact with the viewer. The background remains the busy store aisle with various consumer goods on display.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 小朋友你為什麼要買那麼. (2) [Subtitle]: 生氣的唐老鴨. (3) [Subtitle]: 生理期神器 唐老鴨暖水袋. (4) [Subtitle]: 生理期就很生氣 就要熱水. (5) [Subtitle]: 哇超可愛的 他這個是 他裡面有一個這個 然後你裝熱水放裡面. (6) [Subtitle]: 既可愛又可以暖呼呼你的腹部 然後還可以把這個衣服穿好. (7) [Subtitle]: 如果你這個栓子沒有蓋好的話 你就噴的滿臉都是. (8) [Variety]: 你的臉就會很生氣. (9) [Subtitle]: 遇到你討厭的人 有沒有 你就這樣 用熱水燙人. (10) [Subtitle]: 原來這是一個 復仇神器. [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈 壞壞 哈哈. (11) [Slogan]: $549 很值得哎 唐老鴨最適合擔任這個角色啊. (12) [Slogan]: 裡面可以放 600ml 的熱水. (13) [Subtitle]: 每一隻唐老鴨的臉都非常的可愛 好看哎. (14) [Subtitle]: 好實用哦 這個不用600塊 很划算. (15) [Variety]: 帶我回家. [Subtitle]: 他做工還蠻精緻的. (16) [Subtitle]: 生理期沒來的時候放在沙發上也好看. (17) [Subtitle]: 感覺就是如果在迪士尼販賣會被搶光 一定會 只是他在好市多 你就會思考. [Variety]: 哈哈哈哈.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is prominently visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a white or light lavender ruffled shirt under a sleeveless black button-up vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of high-ceilinged retail warehouse aisles (Costco) with industrial shelving holding large quantities of plush toys, notably pink Care Bears, and other household goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful female voice begins speaking with high arousal and a bright tone, accompanied by an upbeat, synthesized pop BGM track. The acoustics are clean with a slight room resonance typical of a large indoor space. (2) A subtle plastic rustling sound occurs as the person manipulates the plushie. An off-camera male voice joins the conversation, speaking with a relaxed and humorous tone. (3) The female voice rises in pitch while laughing, creating a playful atmosphere. The BGM maintains a steady 124 BPM tempo with a clear 4/4 beat throughout the phase. (4) Brief cartoon-style 'pop' sound effects are inserted during transitions to emphasize key visual points. The two voices continue to overlap in a natural, conversational manner with high intelligibility. (5) The female narrator's volume increases slightly as she concludes her description, maintaining a positive and energetic valence until the audio cuts out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Demonstration -> Price Reveal -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a specific Disney-branded Donald Duck hot water bottle plushie found at Costco, highlighting its 'angry' design as a relatable 'mood' for women during their menstrual cycle while providing price and utility information.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of product features, brand logos (Costco, Disney), and explicit price information suggest a promotional vlog format.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of Traditional Chinese subtitles and variety-show style text to maintain engagement. The combination of relatable humor and practical product information makes it highly shareable on social media platforms.
